name: Check `n Go
description_short: Sterling Heights, MI's Check `n Go at 33455 Van Dyke Ave offers quick payday and title loans with flexible terms and rapid approval.
description_long:
Check `n Go's Sterling Heights, MI location sits at 33455 Van Dyke Ave, a convenient retail storefront in the heart of Sterling Heights. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 2 PM, and is closed on Sundays. This location provides direct access to payday loans and title loans for residents of Sterling Heights who need immediate cash.

At this Sterling Heights branch, customers can apply for payday loans or title loans to cover unexpected expenses. The team at 586-977-2711 can walk you through the application process, explain loan terms, and help you understand repayment options. Call or visit to learn about available loan amounts and eligibility requirements specific to Michigan residents.

If you're in Sterling Heights, MI and need quick cash before your next paycheck, Check `n Go at Van Dyke Ave is designed for same-day or next-day funding. Bring your ID, proof of income, and a recent bank statement. Many Sterling Heights residents use this location for emergency expenses or short-term financial needs.
address: 33455 Van Dyke Ave, Sterling Heights, MI 48312

company_info.headquarters: 33455 Van Dyke Ave, Sterling Heights, MI 48312

pros: Same-day funding available for in-store applicants; next-business-day funding for online applications
Minimal documentation requirements: valid ID, proof of income, active checking account (30+ days old), and working phone number
Extended store hours (10 AM–6 PM Mon–Fri, 10 AM–2 PM Sat) for working professionals
5.0-star Google rating with 1,021+ reviews highlighting fast service and staff professionalism
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, or by phone where available
No Cost Extended Payment Plans reported as available option
Accepts Matricula Consular card as alternative ID documentation
cons: Payday and installment loans typically carry high APRs and fees common to the industry, though specific rates not disclosed on website
Company cannot advise applicants whether approval or loan terms will impact personal credit scores
Requires active checking account of at least 30 days—excludes unbanked or newly banked consumers
Debt trap risk: short repayment terms and high fees can lead to rollover cycles and increasing debt
Website was under maintenance at time of data collection, limiting transparency on current terms and pricing
best_for: Employed individuals with unexpected short-term cash needs ($100–$1,000) and active bank accounts
Consumers needing same-day or next-business-day funding who can document recent income
Borrowers without traditional credit scores or with poor credit history willing to accept higher-cost financing
Workers facing temporary gaps between paychecks or unexpected utility/medical expenses
diagnosis: Check 'n Go is best for employed individuals with active bank accounts facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who can repay within weeks. The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans are high-cost products where APRs and fees can trap borrowers in cycles of debt; users should explore payday alternatives (credit union PALs, CDFI loans) or personal loans before committing.
services: Payday loans (short-term, repaid by next payday)
meta_description: Sterling Heights, MI Check `n Go at 33455 Van Dyke Ave. Quick payday and title loans with same-day approval.
